## Checklist

- [ ] Typecheck passes (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Build passes (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets or PII in code, logs, or fixtures
- [ ] Migration file committed if schema changed
